description_long: This tall, slender obelisk features a central shaft that tapers smoothly to a pointed tip, reminiscent of a rocket or monumental spire. Four cylindrical columns are symmetrically attached around the main shaft, each extending nearly the full height of the structure and anchored to a square base. The base is solid and geometric, providing stability and a sense of permanence, while the shaft and columns are unadorned, emphasizing verticality and sleekness. The surface appears uniform and smooth, with no visible inscriptions or decorative motifs. The overall design is modern and minimalist, with a focus on clean lines and symmetry. The object is rendered in a single, muted color, enhancing its monolithic appearance.
description: A tall, sleek obelisk with a pointed tip, surrounded by four cylindrical columns on a square base, all in a smooth, uniform finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central shaft flanked by four cylindrical columns, all rising from a square base.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the narrow profile of the obelisk, with the columns appearing as thin lines beside the main shaft.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the same arrangement of shaft and columns on the square base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the columns aligned closely to the shaft.
attribute_base_design: The base is a solid, square platform with clean, sharp edges and no visible steps or decorative features. It appears robust and functional, likely made of concrete.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is sharply pointed, conical, and smooth, with no additional features or decorations.
